headline: NFP Friday + Iran Binary Risk. Range-bound with asymmetric downside.

XAG-USD.note: Oversold, bounce likely but Iran de-escalation pressuring safe-haven metals

XAU-USD.note: Consolidating near $4700. Iran deal would deflate 5-8%

BTC-USD.note: 9-day ETF inflow streak ($2.7B). $76K support critical per Tom Lee

ETH-USD.note: Failing at $2400. Weak relative to BTC. EF selling pressure

MSTR.note: Q1 $12.54B loss, STRC dividend sustainability questioned

trade_ideas.rationale: RSI 34.8 oversold suggests bounce, but NFP risk + Iran deal binary risk make new entries premature. Patient holds 12.3sh at $78.80 (+0.4%). Stop at $78.15 (2x ATR). Gold/silver ratio at 62:1 (lowest since 2013) supports long-term thesis. Wait for NFP resolution.

Bold holds 0.2sh BTC at $75,928 (+5.3%). ETF flows extremely strong. $76K is the bull/bear line per Tom Lee. Three technical signals pointing to $85K. Hold through NFP — hot print is modest negative, cold print is strong positive for crypto.
Patient holds 0.4sh at $2,307 (-0.7%). ETH weak relative to BTC, failing at $2,400. EF selling $55M OTC. The $2,500 prophecy checkpoint still pending. No reason to add here. Stop at $2,275.

system_improvements_proposed: TONIGHT: Disable futures_flow (38.3%), add macd/trend/heikin_ashi to DISABLED_SIGNALS
TONIGHT: Add unidirectional bias gate — exclude signals with >90% same-direction over 500+ samples
BACKLOG: Max-IR bounded signal weighting from quant research
risk_warnings: NFP FRIDAY 08:30 ET: April nonfarm payrolls. Prior was massive beat (178K vs 60K). Hot print = stronger USD, metals/crypto down. This is the week's major macro event.
IRAN BINARY RISK: Tehran reviewing one-page MOU. Deal = oil $80-85, gold -5-8%. Collapse = oil $130+, gold spikes. Response expected 'within days'. Trump threatened 'much higher level' bombing.
POWELL-WARSH TRANSITION May 15 (8 days): Warsh is more hawkish. Regime change risk for all risk assets.
MSTR STRC DIVIDEND: Potential forced BTC sales to fund dividend — structural change from never-sell policy.
12 SIGNALS DEGRADED >15pp: Accuracy degradation detected today. Root cause: range-bound market where trend-following signals (8 of the 12) are failing.
research_highlights: Signal correlation analysis: 33 active signals are really ~12 independent viewpoints. Trend cluster (8 signals) votes as one. Mean reversion cluster (4) votes as one.
BTC has 4 permanent-BUY signals (crypto_macro 99% BUY, sentiment 100% BUY, credit_spread_risk 100% BUY, claude_fundamental 100% BUY) creating systemic bullish bias.
Quant research: VIX-adaptive Kelly sizing reduces drawdown 38%. ADX-conditional MACD weighting improves accuracy during trends.
Gold/silver ratio at 62:1 (lowest since 2013) — silver outperformance thesis intact.
Silver structural deficit: 67M oz annual shortfall, 7th consecutive year. China imports hit ATH March 2026.
